message:
Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio notification-hub
escrito en Java. Llevamos 19 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 28 minutos, queremos bajar a 11 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — notification-hub

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/notification-hub/**'
      - '.github/workflows/notification-hub.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/notification-hub/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/notification-hub
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-2
  AWS_REGION: eu-central-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Java
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/notification-hub'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/java
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/notification-hub
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/notification-hub
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          ex

Arquitectura completa para una plataforma SaaS B2B en Azure.
Requisitos:

**Funcionales:**
- 1334 clientes empresariales con SLA 99.90%
- Multi-tenancy con aislamiento de datos (PCI-DSS + SOC2 + GDPR)
- API REST + GraphQL + WebSockets en tiempo real
- ML inference con modelos TensorFlow (<110ms p99)
- Data warehouse para analytics de clientes (71 TB/mes)
- CI/CD con rollback automático < 100 segundos

**No funcionales:**
- Peak: 123k rpm, baseline 20k rpm
- Latencia API: p50 < 41ms, p99 < 366ms
- RPO: 11 minutos, RTO: 16 minutos
- Budget: $94099/mes

**Infraestructura actual a migrar:**
```hcl
terraform {
  required_version = ">= 1.5"
  required_providers {
    aws = {
      source  = "hashicorp/aws"
      version = "~> 5.0"
    }
  }
  backend "s3" {
    bucket         = "tfstate-QA-9850"
    key            = "api-platform/terraform.tfstate"
    region         = "ap-northeast-1"
    encrypt        = true
    dynamodb_table = "tf-lock-QA"
  }
}

provider "aws" {
  region = "ap-northeast-1"
  default_tags {
    tags = {
      Environment = "QA"
      Service     = "api-platform"
      ManagedBy   = "terraform"
    }
  }
}

module "vpc" {
  source  = "terraform-aws-modules/vpc/aws"
  version = "5.1.2"

  name = "api-platform-QA-vpc"
  cidr = "10.202.0.0/16"

  azs             = ["ap-northeast-1a", "ap-northeast-1b", "ap-northeast-1c"]
  private_subnets = ["10.52.1.0/24", "10.81.2.0/24", "10.142.3.0/24"]
  public_subnets  = ["10.240.101.0/24", "10.78.102.0/24", "10.68.103.0/24"]

  enable_nat_gateway   = true
  single_nat_gateway   = true
  enable_dns_hostnames = true

  tags = {
    "kubernetes.io/cluster/api-platform-QA" = "shared"
  }
}

module "eks" {
  source  = "terraform-aws-modules/eks/aws"
  version = "20.0.0"

  cluster_name    = "api-platform-QA"
  cluster_version = "1.31"

  vpc_id     = module.vpc.vpc_id
  subnet_ids = module.vpc.private_subnets

  cluster_endpoint_public_access = true

  eks_managed_node_groups = {
    general = {
      min_size       = 1
      max_size       = 20
      desired_size   = 5
      instance_types = ["c5.xlarge"]

      labels = {
        role = "general"
      }
    }

    spot = {
      min_size       = 0
      max_size       = 17
      desired_size   = 3
      instance_types = ["m5.2xlarge",
                        "m4.2xlarge"]
      capacity_type  = "SPOT"
    }
  }

  cluster_addons = {
    coredns = {
      most_recent = true
    }
    kube-proxy = {
      most_recent = true
    }
    vpc-cni = {
      most_recent = true
    }
    aws-ebs-csi-driver = {
      most_recent              = true
      service_account_role_arn = module.ebs_csi_irsa_role.iam_role_arn
    }
  }
}
```

viendo CrashLoopBackOff en staging. Estos son los últimos logs:

```
[2026-04-14T21:42:03Z] CrashLoopBackOff: back-off 3m restarting failed container

[2026-04-14T21:42:03Z] CrashLoopBackOff: back-off 3m restarting failed container

```

Y este es el deployment actual:

      app: notification-svc
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:

      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification-svc
      annotations:

        prometheus.io/port: "5257"

      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 42635
        fsGroup: 49944
      containers:

          ports:
            - containerPort: 5257
          env:
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: notification-svc-secrets
                  key: database_url

              valueFrom:

                  name: notification-svc-secrets
                  key: redis_url
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: warn
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 1024Mi
          livenessProbe:

              path: /healthz
              port: 5257
            initialDelaySeconds: 21
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 5257
            initialDelaySeconds: 6
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: config
              mountPath: /app/config
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: notification-svc-config
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: notification-svc
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: notification-svc-pdb
spec:
  minAvailable: 6
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-svc
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: notification-svc-hpa
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: notification-svc
  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 28
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: memory
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 84

escrito en Python. Llevamos 18 meses con esta configuración y queremos

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — reporting-engine

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/reporting-engine/**'
      - '.github/workflows/reporting-engine.yml'

    paths:
      - 'services/reporting-engine/**'

      - name: Extract metadata

            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push

Requisitos:

Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio data-pipeline
escrito en Node.js. Llevamos 8 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 57 minutos, queremos bajar a 15 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — data-pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/data-pipeline/**'
      - '.github/workflows/data-pipeline.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/data-pipeline/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/data-pipeline
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-4
  AWS_REGION: eu-central-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/data-pipeline'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/node.js
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/data-pipeline
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/data-pipeline
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          exit-code: '1'

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — api-platform

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/api-platform/**'
      - '.github/workflows/api-platform.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/api-platform/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/api-platform
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-4
  AWS_REGION: us-east-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Java
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/api-platform'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/java
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/api-platform
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/api-platform
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          exit-code: '1'
          severity: 'CRITIC

Arquitectura completa para una plataforma SaaS B2B en GCP.
Requisitos:

**Funcionales:**
- 7232 clientes empresariales con SLA 99.61%
- Multi-tenancy con aislamiento de datos (PCI-DSS + SOC2 + GDPR)
- API REST + GraphQL + WebSockets en tiempo real
- ML inference con modelos PyTorch (<191ms p99)
- Data warehouse para analytics de clientes (94 TB/mes)
- CI/CD con rollback automático < 105 segundos

**No funcionales:**
- Peak: 204k rpm, baseline 50k rpm
- Latencia API: p50 < 46ms, p99 < 442ms
- RPO: 11 minutos, RTO: 6 minutos
- Budget: $125475/mes

terraform {

  }

    encrypt        = true
    dynamodb_table = "tf-lock-desarrollo"
  }
}

provider "aws" {
  region = "sa-east-1"
  default_tags {
    tags = {
      Environment = "desarrollo"
      Service     = "event-processor"
      ManagedBy   = "terraform"
    }
  }
}

module "vpc" {
  source  = "terraform-aws-modules/vpc/aws"
  version = "5.1.2"

  name = "event-processor-desarrollo-vpc"
  cidr = "10.40.0.0/16"

  azs             = ["sa-east-1a", "sa-east-1b", "sa-east-1c"]
  private_subnets = ["10.49.1.0/24", "10.88.2.0/24", "10.16.3.0/24"]
  public_subnets  = ["10.12.101.0/24", "10.8.102.0/24", "10.215.103.0/24"]

  enable_nat_gateway   = true
  single_nat_gateway   = true
  enable_dns_hostnames = true

  tags = {
    "kubernetes.io/cluster/event-processor-desarrollo" = "shared"
  }
}

module "eks" {
  source  = "terraform-aws-modules/eks/aws"
  version = "20.0.0"

  cluster_name    = "event-processor-desarrollo"
  cluster_version = "1.30"

  vpc_id     = module.vpc.vpc_id
  subnet_ids = module.vpc.private_subnets

  cluster_endpoint_public_access = true

  eks_managed_node_groups = {
    general = {
      min_size       = 2

    spot = {

      desired_size   = 8
      instance_types = ["c5.2xlarge",

      capacity_type  = "SPOT"

  }

  cluster_addons = {
    coredns = {
      most_recent = true
    }
    kube-proxy = {
      most_recent = true
    }
    vpc-cni = {
      most_recent = true
    }
    aws-ebs-csi-driver = {
      most_recent              = true
      service_account_role_arn = module.ebs_csi_irsa_role.iam_role_arn
    }
  }
}

Arquitectura completa para una plataforma SaaS B2B en GCP.
Requisitos:

**Funcionales:**
- 2585 clientes empresariales con SLA 99.17%
- Multi-tenancy con aislamiento de datos (PCI-DSS + SOC2 + GDPR)
- API REST + GraphQL + WebSockets en tiempo real
- ML inference con modelos TensorFlow (<52ms p99)
- Data warehouse para analytics de clientes (20 TB/mes)
- CI/CD con rollback automático < 101 segundos

**No funcionales:**
- Peak: 223k rpm, baseline 11k rpm
- Latencia API: p50 < 69ms, p99 < 272ms
- RPO: 3 minutos, RTO: 16 minutos
- Budget: $182042/mes

Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio event-processor
escrito en Node.js. Llevamos 21 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 42 minutos, queremos bajar a 11 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — event-processor

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/event-processor/**'
      - '.github/workflows/event-processor.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/event-processor/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/event-processor
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-1
  AWS_REGION: sa-east-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/event-processor'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/node.js
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/event-processor
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/event-processor
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          exit-

Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio reporting-engine
escrito en Node.js. Llevamos 24 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 45 minutos, queremos bajar a 10 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — reporting-engine

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/reporting-engine/**'
      - '.github/workflows/reporting-engine.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/reporting-engine/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/reporting-engine
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-2
  AWS_REGION: sa-east-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/reporting-engine'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/node.js
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/reporting-engine
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/reporting-engine
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'

Arquitectura completa para una plataforma SaaS B2B en AWS.
Requisitos:

**Funcionales:**
- 3487 clientes empresariales con SLA 99.58%
- Multi-tenancy con aislamiento de datos (PCI-DSS + SOC2 + GDPR)
- API REST + GraphQL + WebSockets en tiempo real
- ML inference con modelos TensorFlow (<98ms p99)
- Data warehouse para analytics de clientes (86 TB/mes)
- CI/CD con rollback automático < 114 segundos

**No funcionales:**
- Peak: 174k rpm, baseline 36k rpm
- Latencia API: p50 < 82ms, p99 < 340ms
- RPO: 7 minutos, RTO: 6 minutos
- Budget: $96089/mes

          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/node.js
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/ml-serving
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/ml-serving
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          exit-code: '1'
          severity: 'CRITICAL'

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — api-platform

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/api-platform/**'
      - '.github/workflows/api-platform.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/api-platform/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/api-platform
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-5
  AWS_REGION: eu-west-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: "1.22"
          cache: go

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          go mod download

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          golangci-lint run ./...

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          go test ./... -race -coverprofile=coverage.out

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/api-platform'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/go
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          govulncheck ./...

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/api-platform
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/api-platform
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:

          format: 'sarif'
          exit-code: '1'

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — ml-serving

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/ml-serving/**'
      - '.github/workflows/ml-serving.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/ml-serving/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/ml-serving
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-4
  AWS_REGION: eu-central-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Java
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/ml-serving'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/java
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/ml-serving
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/ml-serving
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          exit-code: '1'
          severity: 'CRITICAL'

  deploy-s

name: CI/CD Pipeline — data-pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/data-pipeline/**'
      - '.github/workflows/data-pipeline.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/data-pipeline/**'

env:

  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/data-pipeline
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-4

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"
          cache: pip

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          ruff check . && mypy .

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          pytest tests/unit/ -v --cov=. --cov-report=xml

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/data-pipeline'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/python
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          pip-audit --requirement requirements.txt

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/data-pipeline
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:

    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:

      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}

          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata

            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5

Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio event-processor
escrito en Node.js. Llevamos 8 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 48 minutos, queremos bajar a 11 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — event-processor

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/event-processor/**'
      - '.github/workflows/event-processor.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/event-processor/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/event-processor
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-4
  AWS_REGION: eu-west-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/event-processor'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/node.js
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/event-processor
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/event-processor
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          exit-c

Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio auth-service
escrito en Node.js. Llevamos 13 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 50 minutos, queremos bajar a 15 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — auth-service

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/auth-service/**'
      - '.github/workflows/auth-service.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/auth-service/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/auth-service
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-3
  AWS_REGION: ap-northeast-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/auth-service'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/node.js
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/auth-service
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/auth-service
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          exit-code: '1'
          se

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — auth-service

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/auth-service/**'
      - '.github/workflows/auth-service.yml'

    branches: [main]

env:

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: "1.22"
          cache: go

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          go mod download

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          golangci-lint run ./...

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          go test ./... -race -coverprofile=coverage.out

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'

Arquitectura completa para una plataforma SaaS B2B en Azure.
Requisitos:

**Funcionales:**
- 1223 clientes empresariales con SLA 99.18%
- Multi-tenancy con aislamiento de datos (PCI-DSS + SOC2 + GDPR)
- API REST + GraphQL + WebSockets en tiempo real
- ML inference con modelos PyTorch (<81ms p99)
- Data warehouse para analytics de clientes (1 TB/mes)
- CI/CD con rollback automático < 60 segundos

**No funcionales:**
- Peak: 83k rpm, baseline 22k rpm
- Latencia API: p50 < 42ms, p99 < 258ms
- RPO: 13 minutos, RTO: 19 minutos
- Budget: $118481/mes

```hcl
terraform {
  required_version = ">= 1.5"
  required_providers {
    aws = {
      source  = "hashicorp/aws"

    }
  }
  backend "s3" {
    bucket         = "tfstate-desarrollo-9199"
    key            = "api-platform/terraform.tfstate"
    region         = "eu-west-1"
    encrypt        = true
    dynamodb_table = "tf-lock-desarrollo"
  }
}

provider "aws" {
  region = "eu-west-1"
  default_tags {
    tags = {
      Environment = "desarrollo"
      Service     = "api-platform"
      ManagedBy   = "terraform"
    }
  }
}

module "vpc" {
  source  = "terraform-aws-modules/vpc/aws"
  version = "5.1.2"

  name = "api-platform-desarrollo-vpc"
  cidr = "10.31.0.0/16"

  azs             = ["eu-west-1a", "eu-west-1b", "eu-west-1c"]
  private_subnets = ["10.196.1.0/24", "10.213.2.0/24", "10.199.3.0/24"]
  public_subnets  = ["10.136.101.0/24", "10.119.102.0/24", "10.130.103.0/24"]

  enable_nat_gateway   = true
  single_nat_gateway   = true
  enable_dns_hostnames = true

  tags = {
    "kubernetes.io/cluster/api-platform-desarrollo" = "shared"
  }
}

module "eks" {
  source  = "terraform-aws-modules/eks/aws"
  version = "20.0.0"

  cluster_name    = "api-platform-desarrollo"
  cluster_version = "1.28"

  vpc_id     = module.vpc.vpc_id
  subnet_ids = module.vpc.private_subnets

  cluster_endpoint_public_access = true

  eks_managed_node_groups = {
    general = {

      instance_types = ["m5.2xlarge"]

        role = "general"

    spot = {
      min_size       = 0
      max_size       = 12
      desired_size   = 4
      instance_types = ["m5.xlarge",
                        "m4.2xlarge"]
      capacity_type  = "SPOT"
    }
  }

  cluster_addons = {
    coredns = {
      most_recent = true
    }
    kube-proxy = {
      most_recent = true
    }
    vpc-cni = {
      most_recent = true
    }
    aws-ebs-csi-driver = {
      most_recent              = true
      service_account_role_arn = module.ebs_csi_irsa_role.iam_role_arn
    }
  }
}

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — ml-serving

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/ml-serving/**'
      - '.github/workflows/ml-serving.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/ml-serving/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/ml-serving
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-5
  AWS_REGION: eu-west-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up TypeScript
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/ml-serving'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/typescript
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/ml-serving
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/ml-serving
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          exit-code: '1'

Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio auth-service
escrito en Node.js. Llevamos 19 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 42 minutos, queremos bajar a 10 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — auth-service

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/auth-service/**'
      - '.github/workflows/auth-service.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/auth-service/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/auth-service
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-2
  AWS_REGION: ap-southeast-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/auth-service'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/node.js
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/auth-service
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/auth-service
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          exit-code: '1'
          se

Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio reporting-engine
escrito en Go. Llevamos 7 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 32 minutos, queremos bajar a 8 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — reporting-engine

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/reporting-engine/**'
      - '.github/workflows/reporting-engine.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/reporting-engine/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/reporting-engine
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-4
  AWS_REGION: us-west-2

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: "1.22"
          cache: go

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          go mod download

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          golangci-lint run ./...

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          go test ./... -race -coverprofile=coverage.out

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/reporting-engine'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/go
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          govulncheck ./...

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/reporting-engine
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/reporting-engine
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'

Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio data-pipeline
escrito en Go. Llevamos 6 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 45 minutos, queremos bajar a 10 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — data-pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/data-pipeline/**'
      - '.github/workflows/data-pipeline.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/data-pipeline/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/data-pipeline
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-3
  AWS_REGION: sa-east-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: "1.22"
          cache: go

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          go mod download

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          golangci-lint run ./...

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          go test ./... -race -coverprofile=coverage.out

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/data-pipeline'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/go
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          govulncheck ./...

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/data-pipeline
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/data-pipeline
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          exit-code: '1'

Requisitos:

**Funcionales:**
- 6138 clientes empresariales con SLA 99.63%
- Multi-tenancy con aislamiento de datos (PCI-DSS + SOC2 + GDPR)
- API REST + GraphQL + WebSockets en tiempo real
- ML inference con modelos TensorFlow (<66ms p99)
- Data warehouse para analytics de clientes (48 TB/mes)
- CI/CD con rollback automático < 86 segundos

**No funcionales:**
- Peak: 352k rpm, baseline 48k rpm
- Latencia API: p50 < 64ms, p99 < 390ms
- RPO: 5 minutos, RTO: 18 minutos
- Budget: $75215/mes

Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio api-platform
escrito en Node.js. Llevamos 20 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 49 minutos, queremos bajar a 9 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — api-platform

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/api-platform/**'
      - '.github/workflows/api-platform.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/api-platform/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/api-platform
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-5
  AWS_REGION: sa-east-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/api-platform'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/node.js
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/api-platform
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/api-platform
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
          exit-code: '1'
          severity

Arquitectura completa para una plataforma SaaS B2B en GCP.
Requisitos:

**Funcionales:**
- 2840 clientes empresariales con SLA 99.67%
- Multi-tenancy con aislamiento de datos (PCI-DSS + SOC2 + GDPR)
- API REST + GraphQL + WebSockets en tiempo real
- ML inference con modelos PyTorch (<83ms p99)
- Data warehouse para analytics de clientes (22 TB/mes)
- CI/CD con rollback automático < 79 segundos

**No funcionales:**
- Peak: 118k rpm, baseline 32k rpm
- Latencia API: p50 < 35ms, p99 < 245ms
- RPO: 5 minutos, RTO: 9 minutos
- Budget: $97037/mes

Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio event-processor
escrito en Go. Llevamos 19 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 56 minutos, queremos bajar a 11 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — event-processor

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/event-processor/**'
      - '.github/workflows/event-processor.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/event-processor/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/event-processor
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-2
  AWS_REGION: ap-northeast-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: "1.22"
          cache: go

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          go mod download

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          golangci-lint run ./...

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          go test ./... -race -coverprofile=coverage.out

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/event-processor'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/go
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          govulncheck ./...

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/event-processor
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/event-processor
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
