Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio reporting-engine
escrito en Rust. Llevamos 17 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 50 minutos, queremos bajar a 13 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — reporting-engine

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/reporting-engine/**'
      - '.github/workflows/reporting-engine.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/reporting-engine/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/reporting-engine
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-4
  AWS_REGION: ap-northeast-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Rust
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/reporting-engine'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/rust
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/reporting-engine
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/reporting-engine
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'

Requisitos:

**Funcionales:**
- 2809 clientes empresariales con SLA 99.85%
- Multi-tenancy con aislamiento de datos (PCI-DSS + SOC2 + GDPR)

- ML inference con modelos ONNX (<158ms p99)
- Data warehouse para analytics de clientes (72 TB/mes)

**No funcionales:**
- Peak: 127k rpm, baseline 34k rpm
- Latencia API: p50 < 70ms, p99 < 496ms
- RPO: 11 minutos, RTO: 20 minutos
- Budget: $196563/mes

Necesito una revisión completa de nuestro pipeline de CI/CD para el servicio payment-gateway
escrito en Go. Llevamos 6 meses con esta configuración y queremos
mejorar: tiempo de pipeline actual 31 minutos, queremos bajar a 13 minutos.

Aquí está el workflow completo de GitHub Actions:

```yaml
name: CI/CD Pipeline — payment-gateway

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'services/payment-gateway/**'
      - '.github/workflows/payment-gateway.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'services/payment-gateway/**'

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: myorg/payment-gateway
  CLUSTER_NAME: prod-eks-4
  AWS_REGION: us-east-1

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    name: Lint & Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: "1.22"
          cache: go

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          go mod download

      - name: Run linter
        run: |
          golangci-lint run ./...

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          go test ./... -race -coverprofile=coverage.out

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: 'services/payment-gateway'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Run Semgrep
        uses: returntocorp/semgrep-action@v1
        with:
          config: >-
            p/security-audit
            p/go
            p/owasp-top-ten

      - name: Dependency audit
        run: |
          govulncheck ./...

      - name: Generate SBOM
        uses: anchore/sbom-action@v0
        with:
          path: services/payment-gateway
          format: spdx-json

  build-and-push:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-test, security-scan]
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      image-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
      image-tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix={{branch}}-
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - name: Build and push
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: services/payment-gateway
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

      - name: Sign image with cosign
        env:
          COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: 1
        run: |
          cosign sign --yes ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  scan-image:
    name: Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-push
    steps:
      - name: Run Trivy on built image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}@${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image-digest }}
          format: 'sarif'
